name_en: Top-tier factory set with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier factory set with full packaging
Lady Dior Three-compartment Elephant Grey Lambskin Handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Combining an exquisite and dignified temperament with a stylish and modern style, it is a timeless classic piece. Adorned with the iconic light gold-finished metal "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette, paired with an adjustable leather shoulder strap ➕ a detachable metal chain shoulder strap. Dimensions: 17x15x7cm
